_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Bolela mogwera, go tsene.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan e agwa go bula go polelo yohle. Polelo ye nngwe le ye nngwe e na le moputso o mongwe wa phetolelo.
speakFriend.marksAwarded: Marks e neelwe (ditokene tsa go ba karolo)
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Lenaane la dipuo le diterefe tsa Marks ke tsa nakoana. Marks ke ditokene tsa go ba karolo, esego dikaelo.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Fetola Liana Banyan go {{language}}. Hwetsa {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeWelcome: Dikgato tsa Kamogelogong / Lefase la Mewa
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Dietemisi tsa tsela le melaetsa ya mathata
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Polelo ya motheo -- go hlokagala moputso.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Lentšu la Mosadiši: Ke Goreng Mantšu Ao
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Lentšu lefe lefe mo go phepefatšwa ka lebaka. Motheo wa mabitšo 26 a bohlokwa.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Meputso ya Phetolelo e Dira Bjang
speakFriend.step1Body: Bula Moputso wa Phetolelo go tswa Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Fetola distring tšohle tše di hlokegago. Romela ka Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Ka morago ga go amogelwa, o hwetsa Marks le go kwadišwa ho IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Botsa mogwera, o tsene."

languageSwitcher.tip: Diriša diphasewete tša polelo tše di fapanago ka Kgoro ya Durin go bula maitemogelo a a ikgethago!
